title: Manufacturing Engineer - Colgate-Palmolive India - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Colgate-Palmolive India - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Colgate-Palmolive India has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Colgate-Palmolive India:
Colgate-Palmolive India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India!
